overview: ICP Pulse is a live bull/bear sentiment dashboard tracking 9 crypto assets: ICP, BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA, AVAX, INJ, and FET. Each asset has its own sentiment gauge, price card, on-chain signal trackers, sparkline charts, and event/governance log. Data is sourced from CoinGecko and asset-specific APIs with auto-refresh every 5 minutes.
features: Asset selector with 9 cryptocurrencies (ICP, BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA, AVAX, INJ, FET)
Real-time price, 24h/7d change, market cap, and volume
Asset-specific on-chain signal trackers (e.g. ETH burn rate, BTC MVRV, SOL validators)
Governance tracker with NNS proposals for ICP
URL-based asset and tab state persistence
Auto-refresh every 5 minutes with manual refresh button
Accuracy badges showing real vs simulated data sources
